title: acrolasia tenerrima
intro: Acrolasia tenerrima, also known as the 'delicate acrolasia', is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly found in dry and rocky areas. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, headaches, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its health benefits include soothing digestive issues and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Acrolasia tenerrima can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
